description_long: This is a stylized, low-poly airplane with a streamlined fuselage and angular, geometric surfaces. The wings are swept back and positioned mid-fuselage, featuring upward-angled winglets at the tips. The tail section is distinctive, with twin vertical stabilizers connected by a horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a slightly tinted canopy. The color scheme consists of light gray as the primary color, accented with red and blue panels, giving it a modern, futuristic appearance. No visible landing gear is present, and a single propeller is mounted at the rear of the fuselage.
description: A sleek, low-poly airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a rear propeller, finished in gray with red and blue accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, swept mid-mounted wings, and rear-mounted propeller with twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the angular nose, cockpit canopy, and the wide wingspan with upward-angled winglets.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the same wing and tail configuration with visible propeller details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, horizontal stabilizer, and the central rear propeller.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept wings and upward-angled winglets; moderate anhedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and a connecting horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a tinted canopy.
